name: Hawaiian Papaya Chutney
recipeIngredient: 3 Very Firm Papayas (peeled, seeded and cut up)
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel, seed, and cut the papayas.
2. Combine vinegar, brown sugar, onion, limes or lemons, garlic, raisins, tomatoes, bell pepper, ginger, almonds, red pepper flakes, salt, and white wine in a large heavy kettle.
3. Cook gently for 1 hour, stirring frequently, until the liquid is clear and syrupy. Add more wine or water if needed to prevent sticking.
4. Add papayas and pineapple. Continue cooking about 15 minutes or until the fruit is tender.
5. Cool and refrigerate, or fill hot sterilized jars, leaving 1/2-inch head space. Seal.
6. Makes about 4 pints.
